campaigns_subtitle: Create and manage your email marketing campaigns with our visual editor
campaigns_demo_description: Use our drag-and-drop visual editor to create professional, responsive emails. It includes predefined blocks, custom variables, and real-time preview.
campaigns_feature_2_desc: Buttons, images, text, columns, and more
campaigns_save_success_desc: Your email template has been saved successfully
campaigns_save_error_desc: The template could not be saved. Please try again.
campaigns_upload_error_desc: The image could not be uploaded. Please try again.
campaigns_preview_no_preview: Preview not available for this type of content
campaigns_delete_confirmation_descriptio: Are you sure you want to delete this campaign? This action cannot be undone.
campaigns_template_deleted_description: The template has been successfully removed
campaigns_error_loading_description: The campaigns could not be loaded. Please try again.
campaigns_sent_validation_description: Your campaign will be sent shortly after validation by WhatsApp
campaigns_published_description: Your campaign has been successfully published.
